title: Lead SEO Specialist at DTDC Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at DTDC Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the DTDC Global Group family as a SEO Specialist in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DTDC Global Group:
DTDC Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
